title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. exile
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. exile, also known as Swamp Yellow Buttons, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. exile include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Swamp Yellow Buttons may include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
